title: Tempt Behavior
description: Allows a mob to be tempted by a player holding a specific item. Uses pathfinding for movement.

defaultSnippets.label: Sound Interval (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Use Sound Interval as an object

sound_interval.title: Sound Interval
sound_interval.description: Range of random ticks to wait between tempt sounds. Can be a number, an array [min, max], or an object with range_min/range_max or min/max.

defaultSnippets.label: Sound Interval (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Use Sound Interval as an object

can_get_scared.title: Can Get Scared
can_get_scared.description:
If true, the mob can stop being tempted if the player moves too fast while close to this mob.

Sample values:
• fox: true

can_tempt_vertically.title: Can Tempt Vertically
can_tempt_vertically.description:
If true, vertical distance to the player will be considered when tempting.

Sample values:
• frog: true

can_tempt_while_ridden.title: Can Tempt While Ridden
can_tempt_while_ridden.description: If true, the mob can be tempted even if it has a passenger (i.e. if being ridden).

items.title: Items
items.description:
List of items that can tempt the mob.

Sample values:
• chicken: ["wheat_seeds","beetroot_seeds","melon_seeds","...
• cow: ["wheat"]
• fox: ["sweet_berries","glow_berries"]

speed_multiplier.title: Speed Multiplier
speed_multiplier.description:
Movement speed multiplier of the mob when using this AI Goal

Sample values:
• chicken: 1
• cow: 1.25
• fox: 0.5

stop_distance.title: Stop Distance
stop_distance.description: The distance at which the mob will stop following the player.

tempt_sound.title: Tempt Sound
tempt_sound.description: Sound to play while the mob is being tempted.

within_radius.title: Within Radius
within_radius.description:
Distance in blocks this mob can get tempted by a player holding an item they like.

Sample values:
• fox: 16

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.
